contentList.content: The amount of <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">Hit Points</LSTag> restored by potions increases along with your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>.
The amount of <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">Hit Points</LSTag> restored by potions increases along with your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>.

Affected creature's consumed potion will restore additional Hit Points once this status has expired.

No effect if Downed. Consuming another potion will reset the duration of this status.
Antidote
Drink to neutralize the effects of all forms of poison.
Basilisk Oil
Turn a <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PETRIFIED">Petrified</LSTag> creature back to their original form.
Drink to gain the benefits of a <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Affected creature has received the benefits of a <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Drink to gain the benefits of a <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>.
Affected creature has received the benefits of a <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>.
Drink to gain the ability to temporarily comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts.
Potion of Gaseous Form

Drink to transform into a cloud of mist, becoming <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to all non-magical damage. You gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution based <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>, and shrink in size.

Drink to double your <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> distance. While active, you may jump without expending a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Action</LSTag>.

Affected creature's <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> distance has been doubled. They may jump without expending a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Action</LSTag>.
Soporific Oil
When applied to a creature, they fall into a magical slumber. Condition ends when the creature takes damage or they are <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Help">Helped</LSTag>.
Drink to cure any form of disease.
Affected creature is cured of all disease.

Drink to spike your adrenaline, granting yourself the ability to exert beyond your physical limits. While Hastened, you are able to make one action per turn without expending an Action, Bonus Action, or Reaction.

These Hastened actions generate a stack of Exhaustion, and Exhaustion stacks are also generated when damaged. All Attack Rolls made against Exhausted creatures are rolled with Advantage, and should you reach ten stacks of Exhaustion, you immediately fall Unconscious for three turns.
Drink to cure all forms of blindness and paralysis.
Affected creature is cured of all forms of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blindness</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PARALYZED">Paralysis</LSTag>.
Auntie Ethel's Special Brew
A liquid gift from a hag of suspect motivation.
Auntie Ethel's Special Brew
Affected creature takes [1] at the start of every turn until they succeed a Constitution based <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>.
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> is indefinitely reduced by 1.
Affected creature has gained <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Bite_MothersLoathing">Bite</LSTag>.
Something waits for you to sleep...
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> is reduced by 2. They cannot take <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reactions</LSTag>.
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> is increased by 2.
Affected creature has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on Wisdom based <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to poison damage.
Affected creature is hostile to all other creatures.

Affected creature feels illusory spiders running up and down their body, imposing <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>.
Affected creature is seeing myriad visions of a world beyond reckoning - or so they keep insisting.
Affected creature has been overcome by a deep, dream-ridden sleep, induced by judicious ingesting of Ether.

Affected creature has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on Dexterity and Charisma based <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag> while under the Silkroot's silky-sweet beguilement.
Affected creature moves faster but becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="EXHAUSTED">Exhausted</LSTag> while under the frenetic influence of Terazul.

Drink to nullify the effects of poisons, gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> against being Poisoned, and gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Poison damage.
Duergar Antidote

Affected creature has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> against being Poisoned and <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Poison damage.

Drink to cure any form of disease, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blindness</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PARALYZED">Paralysis</LSTag>, or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POISONED">Poison</LSTag>.
Drink to permanently increase your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> by 2.
Drink to increase your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> has increased by 2.
Drink to enter a bloodlust. Once per turn when you kill a foe, you gain [1] <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">Temporary Hit Points</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature has entered a murderous state of bloodlust. Once per turn, when it kills an enemy, it gains [1] <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">Temporary Hit Points</LSTag>.
You have entered a murderous state of bloodlust. Once per turn, when you kill an enemy, you gain [1] <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">Temporary Hit Points</LSTag>.
Affected creature's has been granted <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">Temporary Hit Points</LSTag> due to their bloodlust.
Elixir of Reverence
Drink to become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLESS">Blessed</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Elixir of Reverence
Affected creature is <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLESS">Blessed</LSTag>.

Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Concentration">Concentration</LSTag> based <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature rolls with <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on all <LSTag Tooltip="Concentration">Concentration</LSTag> based <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
Elixir of Vigilance
Drink to gain a +4 bonus to Initiative. In addition, you can't be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SURPRISED">Surprised</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature has a +4 bonus to Initiative and can't be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SURPRISED">Surprised</LSTag>.
Drink to increase your <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> by 2. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> has increased by 2.
Drink to reduce the number you need to roll to land a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> by 1. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature needs to roll 1 lower in order to roll a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.

Drink to gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="ALCH_ELIXIR_TADPOLE">Psionic Weakening</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="ALCH_ELIXIR_TADPOLE_ADVANTAGE">Psionic Enrichment</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to increase your <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> by 2. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> has increased by 2.
Drink to gain an additional Level [1] <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain an additional Level [1] <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain an additional Level [1] <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain an additional Level 1, 2, and 3 <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature has an additional Level 1, 2, and 3 <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>.
Affected creature has an additional Level [1] <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature has an additional Level [1] <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature has an additional Level [1] <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Elixir of Darkvision
Affected creature can see in the dark, magical or otherwise, up to [1].
Acid Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Acid damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Cold Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Cold damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Fire Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Fire damage. Can no longer <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BURNING">Burn</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Force Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Force damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Lightning Resistance

Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Lightning damage. Can no longer be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHOCKED">Shocked</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHOCKED_SURFACE">Electrocuted</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_CHARGED_LIGHTNING_AURA_ELECTRIFIED">Jolted</LSTag>, or otherwise affected by lightning. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Necrotic Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Necrotic damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Poison Resistance

Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Poison damage. Can no longer be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POISONED">Poisoned</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Psychic Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Psychic damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Radiant Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Radiant damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Thunder Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Thunder damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Damage Resistance
Affected creature is <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to all damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Acid damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Cold damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Force damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Radiant damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Thunder damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.

Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Fire damage. In addition, you can no longer <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BURNING">Burn</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.

Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Lightning damage. In addition, you can no longer be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHOCKED">Shocked</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHOCKED_SURFACE">Electrocuted</LSTag>, or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_CHARGED_LIGHTNING_AURA_ELECTRIFIED">Jolted</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.

Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Poison damage. In addition, you can no longer be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POISONED">Poisoned</LSTag>. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Necrotic damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Psychic damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Drink to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to all damage. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Elixir of Hill Giant Strength
Drink to increase your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> by 2. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.
Affected creature's <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> has increased by 2.
